meta.title: I Am Really Sorry — Create a Funny Apology Website for Free
meta.description: Make a personalized apology page with 3D animations, meme sounds, and a runaway No button. The funniest way to say sorry to your girlfriend, boyfriend, or friend online.
meta.keywords: apology website, sorry page for girlfriend, make apology website, funny sorry page, i am sorry website, apology to boyfriend, online apology generator

hero.subtitle: A formal declaration of
hero.heading: I'M SORRY
hero.scrollHint: Scroll down (I have a lot to say)

meter.title: Let me quantify my remorse
meter.label: How sorry I am:
meter.error: ERROR: Sorry level exceeds maximum capacity
meter.footnote: Scientists confirm: no one in history has ever been this sorry. The scale was not prepared.

reasons.title: I know what I did wrong

items.title: I was a clown
items.text: Not the funny kind. The scary kind that ruins birthday parties.

items.title: My brain left the chat
items.text: It went on vacation and forgot to tell me. Zero thoughts, just vibes (bad ones).

items.title: I was acting like trash
items.text: And not even recyclable trash. Straight-to-landfill behavior.

items.title: I know I messed up
items.text: If my apology were a movie, it'd be a 12-part series. With director's cuts.

promises.title: My solemn promises
promises.subtitle: (Pinky promise, cross my heart, the whole thing)
items: I'll actually listen when you're talking (not just nod while thinking about food)
I'll remember the important dates (setting 47 reminders as we speak)
I'll stop doing that thing that annoys you (you know the one)
I'll give you the TV remote without a fight (most of the time)
I'll admit I'm wrong faster (starting now: I WAS WRONG)

forgive.title: Now the moment of truth...
forgive.question: So... do you forgive me?
forgive.hint: (The No button is getting scared... maybe just click Yes? 😅)
forgive.successSub: I promise to be better. You mean everything to me.

footer.madeWith: Made with 100% genuine remorse and a sprinkle of desperation
footer.copyright: © 2026 iamreallysorry.com — All rights reserved by guilt

landing.h1: Create Your Apology Website — Free & Funny
landing.h2_1: The Most Creative Way to Say Sorry Online
landing.p1: Stop sending boring text messages. Create a personalized, interactive apology page with 3D animations, meme sounds, and a button that literally runs away when they try to say No. Share it via link and watch them smile.
features: Runaway No button (they can't say no!)
Meme sound effects (sad violin, vine boom, airhorn)

faq.a: Yes, completely free. No signup, no hidden fees.
Yes! Enter their name and the entire page is personalized for them.
Absolutely. Fully responsive with touch support for the runaway button.

faq.q: Can I use this for my boyfriend/girlfriend/friend?
faq.a: Yes! It works for anyone — girlfriend, boyfriend, best friend, spouse, or family member.
Just send the link. The name is embedded in the URL so they get a personalized experience.
